---
name: "Spike (SAFe)"
about: Time-boxed research to de-risk a solution
title: "Spike: <question to answer>"
labels: ["spike","priority/triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Research Question
What decision/outcome will this spike enable?

## Timebox
<e.g., 1–2 days>

## Scope & Deliverables
- [ ] Findings summary (bullets)
- [ ] Recommendation (go/no-go, approach)
- [ ] Benchmark/metrics (if applicable)
- [ ] Issue(s)/PR(s) to implement (links)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clear recommendation documented
- [ ] Data/bench notes attached
